allow: Bash(curl -sN -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/runs -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"prompt":"In one short paragraph, what is LangGraph?","thread_id":"gate-1"}' --max-time 90)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['id']\) for m in sorted\(d['data'],key=lambda x:x['id']\)]")

Bash(curl -sN -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/runs -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"prompt":"What planet did I just ask you about? Answer in one word.","thread_id":"curl-gate"}' --max-time 120)
